title: Recursive CTE for organizational hierarchy with depth ranking
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.subordinates_with_depth/1` that takes a `manager_id` and returns all descendants (transitive subordinates) along with their depth in the hierarchy. Assume `User` has a `manager_id` pointing to another user. Use `with_cte/3` + `recursive: true`. Base case: direct reports. Recursive case: reports of reports with `depth + 1`. Return `{id, name, depth}` ordered by depth and name. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Recursive CTEs in Ecto require both a base + recursive case joined by union_all and proper with_cte setup. Niche API.
